title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
